metadesc_interactive_playground_fo.en: Interactive playground for the Encoding API - TextEncoder, TextDecoder, byte-level visualization, and encoding comparisons.

h3_input_bytes_comma_separat.en: Input bytes (comma-separated decimal or hex with 0x prefix)

subtitle_textencoder_always_encode.en: TextEncoder always encodes to UTF-8. Type text to see it converted to bytes in real time.

subtitle_textdecoder_supports_many.en: TextDecoder supports many encodings. Convert byte sequences back to text.

subtitle_see_exactly_how_each_char.en: See exactly how each character is encoded to bytes. Colors indicate byte count per character.

subtitle_textdecoder_with_stream_t.en: TextDecoder with stream:true handles multi-byte characters split across chunks. Essential for processing streamed data.

subtitle_the_emoji_character_u_1f6.en: The emoji character (U+1F680) requires 4 UTF-8 bytes: F0 9F 9A 80. Watch what happens when we split it across chunks.

subtitle_the_encoding_api_doesn_t.en: The Encoding API doesn't include detection, but we can analyze byte patterns to guess encodings. This demonstrates common heuristics.

subtitle_see_how_the_same_byte_seq.en: See how the same byte sequence produces different text depending on encoding.

subtitle_inspect_text_encoding_at.en: Inspect text encoding at the bit level. See hex, decimal, octal, and binary representations.

subtitle_compare_encoding_decoding.en: Compare encoding/decoding performance. TextEncoder is optimized for UTF-8; TextDecoder handles many encodings.

placeholder_type_or_paste_text_here_t.en: Type or paste text here... Try emoji, CJK, Arabic, etc.

placeholder_type_text_to_visualize_by.en: Type text to visualize byte encoding...

placeholder_enter_long_text_to_proces.en: Enter long text to process in chunks...

placeholder_enter_text_to_compare_siz.en: Enter text to compare sizes across encodings...
